style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Pinsir's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its metallic surface. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into crystalline shards. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the cold light like tiny diamonds. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
